text: The onboarding dashboard should highlight cost, setup time, and privacy controls.
The onboarding dashboard should highlight cost, setup time, and privacy controls.
I would focus the first screen on clinical safety notes and a short tutorial.
A compact tutorial with privacy settings and setup guidance would help.
I would trust the result more if the system explained the evidence behind each recommendation.
The most useful feature would be a dashboard that compares cost, reliability, and response time.
Clear privacy controls and a short exportable summary would make the workflow easier to review.
I would prefer examples from realistic deployment contexts before deciding whether to adopt it.
Pricing needs transparent monthly tiers and a trial that covers a complete team workflow.
The buying decision depends on security documentation, integration effort, and support availability.
A side-by-side comparison with current tools would help justify the transition.
The product should show measurable time savings before I would recommend a paid plan.
